nasb.text: To Seth, to him also a son was born; and he called his name Enosh. Then men began to call upon the name of the Lord.

esv.text: To Seth also a son was born, and he called his name Enosh. At that time people began to call upon the name of the Lord.

cnv.text: 塞特也生了一個兒子，就給他起名叫以挪士。那時人才開始呼求耶和華的名。

ccb.text: 塞特生了一个儿子，给他取名叫以挪士。那时候，人才开始求告耶和华。

csbs.text: 塞特也生了一个儿子，并给他起名为以挪士。那时人开始呼求耶和华的名。
